candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total because same values as Total Revenue and less subtotal-like.
Also matches revenue but is a total/duplicate of Revenues, so lower priority.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost subcomponent.
Not revenue; cost subcomponent.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Not revenue; cost subcomponent.
Not revenue; cost line.
Not revenue; cost total.

variables.notes: Using priority list for revenue line changes over time; prefer Revenues over duplicate Total Revenue.

candidates.why: Most direct and comprehensive COGS/cost of sales label; preferred over cost subtotals and components.
Related cost line but lower than explicit Cost of goods sold and appears lower than total in some years.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not full COGS.
Only a component of COGS, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Only a component of COGS, not full COGS.
Also plausible COGS label, but explicit Cost of goods sold is more direct.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit direct production/service cost line.

candidates.why: Core SG&A component and explicitly populated. Prefer component rows over totals; duplicate label appears twice but should only be selected once.
Core SG&A component and explicitly populated. Duplicate label appears twice but should only be selected once.
Overhead-type operating expense bucket; acceptable SG&A component when excluding D&A and non-operating items.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Selling Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded from SG&A per rule because amortization should not be included.
Excluded from SG&A per rule because depreciation should not be included.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded from SG&A per rule because depreciation should not be included.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Intangibles in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded from SG&A per rule because amortization should not be included.
Excluded from SG&A per rule because depreciation should not be included.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Excluded from SG&A per rule because depreciation should not be included.

variables.notes: No single explicit combined SG&A row is present. Selected overhead component rows only, excluding depreciation/amortization subcomponents and avoiding totals/balancing items.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense label and populated in recent years; best choice.
Only an amortization component, not full R&D expense.
Only a depreciation component, not full R&D expense.

candidates.why: Only a depreciation component, not full R&D expense.
Also a direct R&D line and may cover earlier years; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental amortization, not the main R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not income statement expense.

variables.notes: Priority list of direct R&D expense labels across years; excluded depreciation/amortization subcomponents and balance sheet asset rows.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; fallback only if explicit interest expense is missing.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest subcomponent, but narrower than total interest expense.
Explicit interest expense line; preferred.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental narrow subcomponent, lowest priority.

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense over time. Prefer explicit Interest Expense; use broader Financial expenses only as fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best book equity measure because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Would include NCI and risk double counting if MIB is also used; fallback only.
Balancing item, not an equity measure to select.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-owner equity line to exclude non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not preferred when balance sheet NCI exists.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful fallback.
Income statement allocation line, less preferred than balance sheet NCI.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance sheet NCI labels. Using balance sheet labels avoids mixing with income statement attribution lines.
